message.content:
Research the current competitive landscape for AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) platforms as of early 2026. I need detailed feature lists for these specific competitors:

1. **Profound** (getprofound.ai) - AI citation monitoring
2. **Evertune** (evertune.ai) - AI brand monitoring
3. **Otterly.ai** - AI search monitoring
4. **Brandwatch / Cipher** - AI visibility
5. **Semrush** - their AI/AEO features specifically
6. **Ahrefs** - their AI/AEO features specifically
7. **Frase.io** - AI content optimization
8. **Surfer SEO** - AI content features
9. **HubSpot** - AI marketing features
10. **Yext** - AI search/answers features
11. **Brightedge** - AI search features
12. **Seomonitor** - AI tracking features
13. **Scrunch.ai** - AI citation tracking
14. **Peec AI** - AI visibility
15. **Knowatoa** - AEO platform

For each competitor, I need:
- What features they offer (monitoring, content generation, schema, API, integrations, retargeting, etc.)
- Their pricing model if available
- What makes them unique
- What they DON'T offer that CitedBy might

Search the web thoroughly for the most up-to-date information (2025-2026). Focus on actual product features, not marketing claims.

Links: [{"title":"Profound | Optimize Your Brand's Visibility in AI Search","url":"https://www.tryprofound.com/"},{"title":"Profound vs Authoritas AI Tracker | Feature Comparison & Pricing","url":"https://www.authoritas.com/ai-tracker-comparison/profound"},{"title":"My Profound AI Search Visibility Review (for SaaS / Tech B2B)","url":"https://generatemore.ai/blog/my-profound-ai-search-visibility-review-for-saas-/-tech"},{"title":"Profound Review 2026: Is This Enterprise GEO Tool Worth It?","url":"https://getmint.ai/resources/profound-review"},{"title":"Profound Reviews 2025, Features, Platforms, Pricing, Prompts for AI Search Visibility & Tracking | AEOTools.space | AEO Tools Directory","url":"https://www.aeotools.space/tool/profound"},{"title":"Profound AI Review for 2026: Is It Worth the Investment? | Rankability Blog","url":"https://www.rankability.com/blog/profound-ai-review/"},{"title":"Profound AI Review: Is It Worth The Investment for GEO?","url":"https://writesonic.com/blog/profound-review"},{"title":"Profound AI Review: Tested on 3 Real Campaigns [My Verdict]","url":"https://www.tryanalyze.ai/blog/profound-ai-review"},{"title":"7 Best Affordable Profound AI Alternatives in 2025 ($29/mo)","url":"https://www.promptmonitor.io/blog/profound-ai-alternatives"},{"title":"Best Profound Alternatives for AI Search Visibility & Optimization 2026","url":"https://aiclicks.io/blog/best-profound-alternatives"}]

Based on the search results, here's comprehensive information about Profound's AI citation monitoring features and pricing:

## Key Features

Profound is a Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform used to monitor and analyze a brand's visibility in AI-generated answers. It tracks how often a brand is cited by AI models like ChatGPT and Perplexity, analyzes the sentiment of these mentions, and benchmarks performance against competitors.

Profound captures citations and reference links that AI engines provide in their responses. The platform aggregates these to show: Citation sources: Which websites drive AI answers about your brand, Source authority: Ranked list of domains AI models reference when discussing your topics, Citation frequency: How often each source is referenced across different prompts.

The Conversation Explorer identifies relevant user queries and topics within a specific industry. The feature moves beyond tracking a specific brand name to show the broader conversations where competitors may be cited or mentioned.

## Pricing (2025-2026)

The Lite plan starts at $499 per month (billed annually with a small discount) and is aimed at startups, agencies, and smaller enterprise units testing the waters of generative visibility tracking. At this level, users can track four AI engines, monitor one company, and follow up to 200 prompts.

The Growth plan, set at $399 per month, can only monitor three platforms: ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

Profound is currently available through customized enterprise pricing.

## Platform Coverage

Profound monitors brand mentions across major AI engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Copilot, Gemini, Grok, Meta AI, DeepSeek) and tracks how your brand appears in AI-generated responses.

## Enterprise Features

Profound is SOC 2 Type II compliant, demonstrating commitment to robust security and data protection. Streamline access with SSO using SAML or OIDC, enhancing security and simplifying user authentication.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

## Evertune AI Brand Monitoring Platform - Features & Pricing

Based on the search results, here's comprehensive information about Evertune's brand monitoring platform:

### Overview
Evertune is the Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform that helps brands improve visibility in AI search across ChatGPT, AI Overview, AI Mode, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, Meta, DeepSeek and Copilot.

### Key Features

**Brand Monitoring:**
- Monitors how ChatGPT, AI Mode, AI Overview, Claude and more describe your brand, tracking visibility, sentiment & competitive gaps.
- AI Brand Index that shows your visibility score compared to competitors, sentiment analysis of how AI models describe your brand, and competitive intelligence showing where competitors are winning.

**Recent Features (2026):**
- Announced Shopping Intelligence, a new capability that tracks how AI models recommend products and translates raw data into actionable optimization strategies.

**Additional Capabilities:**
- Website audits specifically focused on how AI crawlers interpret your site, analyzing structure, content, and metadata to identify optimization opportunities that will improve discoverability by AI models.
- Data science at scale across every major LLM with specific content, messaging and distribution tactics that increase AI search visibility.

### Pricing
Pricing for Evertune's GEO platform starts at $3,000 per month. Comprehensive capabilities are included in transparent $3,000/month starting pricing with no hidden costs or per-model upcharges.

### Target Market
Evertune is trusted by Fortune 500 brands across all verticals, including Finance, Retail/E-Commerce, Automotive, Pharma, Tech, Travel, Food/Beverage, Entertainment, CPG, and B2B.

## Pricing (2025-2026)

Otterly.ai offers three pricing tiers: the Lite Plan at $29/month with 15 search prompts, the Standard Plan at $189/month with 100 search prompts, and the Premium plan at $489/month with 400 search prompts. There's also a higher-tier option: the 'Cloud Pro' plan available at $989 per month with 1000 search prompts. Otterly.ai offers a free trial to test the platform before committing to a paid plan.

## Key Features

Otterly.ai is the #1 rated AI search monitoring platform that tracks brand mentions, monitors website citations, and optimizes for ChatGPT, Perplexity & Google AI Overviews.

The platform includes several core features:

- Search Prompt Monitoring – automatically checks chosen prompts daily across engines, and Brand Reports with dedicated brand-level dashboards tracking mentions, coverage, and domain citations
- Domain Ranking & Analytics to track every cited domain/URL weekly, and Link Citations Analysis to see which URLs are referenced most by which AI search engines
- AI Keyword Research Tool to turn keywords, brands, or URLs into real prompts your audience uses in AI search
- Brand Visibility Index – a KPI showing how visible a brand is across ChatGPT and AI search over time

The tool monitors brand presence on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, and Copilot.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Brandwatch's AI visibility monitoring features for 2025-2026:

## Brandwatch's AI-Powered Visibility Monitoring Features

In November 2025, Brandwatch announced expanded data content and a new wave of AI-powered innovation that redefine how marketers and communicators discover, interpret, and act on insights.

### Iris AI Suite

At the center of this evolution is Iris AI — the intelligence layer embedded throughout the Brandwatch suite — designed to help brands see, understand, and respond to what truly matters.

Key Iris AI capabilities include:

1. **Ask Iris Chat Assistant**: Ask natural-language questions and get instant, data-driven answers powered by Brandwatch. It searches and analyzes data without requiring a query or dashboard, automatically creates charts and summaries, and lets you continue the conversation to refine or explore insights.

2. **AI Query Writer**: Create complete Boolean queries from scratch with suggested hashtags, keywords, and subreddits.

3. **AI Dashboards**: Turn data into clarity by summarizing insights in seconds and revealing the story behind the numbers with narrative summaries that explain what matters most.

### Expanded Data Coverage

Now includes Threads, YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn, search data in Trajaan, and 70,000+ trending podcasts with transcript analysis.

### LLM Brand Visibility Tracking

Brandwatch functions as AI brand visibility tracking software for large datasets, tracks AI brand mentions across generative answers and conversational data sources, uses predictive models to forecast visibility shifts tied to topic trends, and supports monitoring brand mentions in ChatGPT-style responses alongside social data.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Semrush's AI AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) features for 2025-2026:

## Semrush AI AEO Features

Semrush launched its AI search offering, AI Visibility Toolkit, in September 2025. The AI Visibility Toolkit is an add-on to Semrush's suite of SEO products and covers a wide range of AEO use cases related to monitoring and auditing.

### Key Capabilities

Instead of treating AEO as a separate discipline, Semrush enriches its existing features, like Position Tracking and Sensor, with AI Overview data. This unified approach allows users to monitor their visibility in both traditional blue-link SERPs and Google's AI-generated snapshots from a single dashboard.

Users can also use the Semrush Content Toolkit to produce AI-generated content. The AI Writing Assistant helps optimize content for both traditional search and AI comprehension, with real-time suggestions for improving content readability, SEO, and tone, comprehensive keyword research to identify topics that both users and AI models care about, and competitive analysis to see what content competitors create that might be getting cited by AI platforms.

### Monitoring Capabilities

To monitor your visibility more reliably, use Semrush's AI Visibility Toolkit to track mentions across AI-generated answers. The platform also monitors brand and keyword mentions across major LLMs like ChatGPT and Gemini.

### Pricing

The AI Visibility Toolkit costs $99 per month per domain, but is only available to customers with a Semrush subscription.

Based on my search results, here's what I found about Ahrefs AI AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) features for 2025-2026:

## Ahrefs' AEO Tools and Features

Ahrefs Brand Radar tracks millions of AI prompts and quickly checks brand positioning across major models, offering a free tier for basic features. The tool's AI responses tab allows you to see what different AI search platforms say about your brand and compare it to competitor coverage in your market or niche.

## Key AEO Insights from Ahrefs Research

Ahrefs reports AI traffic as their highest converting channel, despite being less than 1% of total traffic, with conversion rates exceeding 10%. This demonstrates the significant value of AEO optimization.

A study by Louise Linehan and Xibeijia Guan based on 15,000 prompts with Ahrefs Brand Radar showed that the overall overlap between AI citations and Google's top 10 results is only 12%, with ChatGPT performing even worse at only 8% overlap with Google and Bing.

## AEO Best Practices (Per Ahrefs Recommendations)

Schema markup is recommended to guide AI systems, with schema types like Article, FAQPage, HowTo, LocalBusiness, and Speakable helping machines recognize important information.

According to Ahrefs' insights, structured content wins with AI systems, trust signals are decisive, and freshness is mandatory—with brands leading in AEO updating their content quarterly.

## Key Features

Frase includes an AI Agent with research, optimization, AI visibility tracking, site audits, publishing, and API capabilities. The main features include a content editor, SEO analytics, and content optimization, all aimed at enhancing SEO performance.

Notable features include:

- A Content Editor that's AI-powered for SEO-driven content creation with real-time SERP analysis, optimization suggestions, keyword suggestions, topic scoring, and competitor outline comparisons

Based on the search results, here's a comprehensive overview of Surfer SEO's AI content optimization features and pricing for 2025-2026:

## Pricing Plans

SurferSEO offers three main plans in 2026: Essential, Scale, and Enterprise.

**Essential Plan:**
It costs $99 per month, or $79 per month if you pay for the year, which saves you $240. This plan gets you 30 Content Editor articles and 5 AI-generated articles per month.

**Scale Plan:**
It costs $219 per month, or $175 per month with an annual subscription, saving you $528 for the year. It increases your limits to 100 Content Editor articles and 20 AI articles per month.

**Enterprise Plan:**
Includes all support from the Scale plan, plus personalized onboarding, priority support, a dedicated success manager, quarterly reviews, and legal assistance.

## Key AI Features

All-in-one features for content optimization, keyword research, AI insights, and SERP analysis, with Surfy helping with content creation, plagiarism checks, and keyword optimization.

**Content Editor:**
Its combination of real-time feedback, a Content Score, and integrations with Google Docs and WordPress makes it a central tool for effective content optimization.

**Surfer AI:**
Surfer AI generates complete SEO-optimized articles in 15-20 minutes using GPT-4 Turbo with brand voice customization, though at an additional cost of $29 per article.

**AI Detection & Humanizer:**
Process up to 50,000 words per month with the AI Detector and Humanizer, or 600,000 words per year.

## Performance & Correlation

Surfer SEO's Content Score demonstrates a 0.28 Spearman correlation with actual Google rankings according to a 2025 study analyzing 1 million SERP entries, making it one of the strongest on-page signals content creators can directly control.
